items.title: Linus Torvalds says Linux security list is becoming ‘unmanageable’ due to AI bug reports
items.description: Linux founder Linus Torvalds said in his most recent state of the kernel post that "the continued flood of AI reports has basically made the security list almost entirely unmanageable, with enormous duplication due to different people finding the same things with the same tools," as The Register rep...
